---
title: "eslint.config.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\eslint.config.js"
loc: 36
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.35
style_score: 4.11
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 5.98
---

## Intent
The `eslint.config.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on tseslint. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via tseslint. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://@eslint/js)
- [*](file://eslint-plugin-jsdoc)
- [*](file://typescript-eslint)

### Exports
- `tseslint`
